reason: Tests verify exact implementation text (variable names, code patterns) rather than behavior. The asserted strings (userViteConfig, astroPreviewConfig, mergedViteConfig, _plugins, mergeConfig call pattern, destructuring pattern) are the fix itself. Satisfying behavior_in_task_description requires including these exact strings, but doing so violates no_solution_leakage and instruction_no_hint_leakage since they constitute the complete solution. Additionally, solution_uniqueness_guard, tests_verify_behavior_not_text, and test_not_tautological all fail because the tests check for string presence in source files rather than actual runtime behavior. The tests need rewriting to verify behavior, not text.
